layers.L1 — JWT request-time (auth.ts): Downgrades token.isPremium in-memory if premiumExpiry < now. Zero DB writes. Effective within ≤2 min (cache TTL).
layers.L2 — Cron DB cleanup (refresh-ranking): Batch-updates User.isPremium=false for all rows where isPremium=true and premiumExpiry<now. Runs every 30 min (existing cron).
layers.L3 — Admin stats (admin/stats): premiumUsers count uses OR[premiumExpiry=null, premiumExpiry>now] to exclude expired rows.

checks.name: L1 · JWT callback: expiry check inserted after cache-hit AND cache-miss paths
checks.detail: Block: `if (token.isPremium && token.premiumExpiry)` must exist in jwt callback

checks.name: L1 · JWT callback: sets token.isPremium = false when expiry < now
checks.detail: Downgrades token in-memory — no DB write required

checks.name: L1 · JWT callback: uses Date constructor and guards against NaN
checks.detail: Prevents invalid-date bugs from crashing the auth flow

checks.name: L1 · expiry check is AFTER cache-hit block (correct ordering)
checks.detail: Ordering: cache-hit block → cache-miss block → expiry override → return token

checks.name: L1 · expiry check is AFTER cache-miss block (correct ordering)
checks.detail: Override fires after DB data is loaded, not before

checks.name: L1 · premiumExpiry still forwarded to session (token.premiumExpiry not nulled)
checks.detail: UI can still display the expiry date even after isPremium is downed in token

checks.name: L2 · Cron: updateMany to set isPremium=false for expired users
checks.detail: db.user.updateMany({ where: { isPremium:true, premiumExpiry:{ lt:new Date() } }, data:{ isPremium:false } })

checks.name: L2 · Cron: filters by premiumExpiry lt new Date()
checks.detail: Only updates users whose expiry has already passed

checks.name: L2 · Cron: premium expiry runs BEFORE listing expiry steps
checks.detail: Premium cleanup is Step 1; listing work is Steps 3-6

checks.name: L2 · Cron: expiredPremiumUsers included in response stats
checks.detail: Operators can observe how many users were expired per run

checks.name: L2 · Cron: does NOT touch isBoosted or isFeatured in premium step
checks.detail: Boost and Featured logic is untouched as required

checks.name: L3 · Stats: premiumUsers count excludes expired (uses OR filter)
checks.detail: Counts users where premiumExpiry IS NULL (admin-granted) OR premiumExpiry > now

checks.name: L3 · Stats: still requires isPremium=true as base condition
checks.detail: isPremium=false users are excluded even if premiumExpiry is in the future

checks.name: L4 · UI not modified: Dashboard still reads isPremium from session/store
checks.detail: Dashboard.tsx unchanged — derives isPremium from Zustand/session only

checks.name: L4 · UI not modified: Header still reads isPremium from session/store
checks.detail: Header.tsx unchanged — no client-side expiry logic introduced

checks.name: DB · Cron query: finds an expired-premium user (isPremium=true, expiry<now)
checks.detail: Query returned 1 row(s) for the test expired user

checks.name: DB · Cron simulation: sets isPremium=false for expired user
checks.detail: updateMany affected 1 row; isPremium after = false

checks.name: DB · Cron query: does NOT touch active premium user (expiry in future)
checks.detail: Query returned 0 rows for the active premium user (expected 0)

checks.name: DB · Stats query: active premium user appears in count
checks.detail: Stats query found 1 row(s) for the active user (expected 1)

checks.name: DB · Stats query: expired-then-reset user excluded from count
checks.detail: Stats query found 0 row(s) for post-cron expired user (expected 0)

checks.name: JWT · Request-time logic: isPremium set to false when expiry in the past
checks.detail: In-memory override: token.isPremium=true + past expiry → token.isPremium=false

checks.name: JWT · Request-time logic: isPremium stays true when expiry is in the future
checks.detail: Active premium user is not incorrectly downgraded

checks.name: JWT · Request-time logic: isPremium stays true when premiumExpiry is null (admin-granted)
checks.detail: Null expiry = permanent grant; condition short-circuits on the && check
